test_desc: Smoke - Navigate to approval config page
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/approval-engine/config; Wait for page to fully load; Verify page title displays 'Approval Configuration'
expected_result: Approval configuration page loads successfully; A list or table of approval configs is visible (may be empty initially); 'Add Configuration' button is visible and enabled; Columns include transactionType

test_desc: Smoke - Create approval configuration for purchase orders
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/approval-engine/config; Click 'Add Configuration' button; Select transactionType dropdown value 'purchase_order'; Set isRequired toggle to 'Yes'; Select approverRoleId dropdown to a manager or admin role; Fill thresholdAmount field with '5000000'; Fill timeoutHours field with '48'; Select timeoutAction dropdown value 'auto_reject'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Approval configuration for purchase orders is created successfully; Success notification appears; Configuration appears in the list showing transactionType='purchase_order', isRequired=true, thresholdAmount=5000000, timeoutHours=48, timeoutAction='auto_reject'; Approver role is correctly assigned

test_desc: Smoke - Navigate to pending approvals page
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/approval-engine/pending; Wait for page to fully load; Verify page title displays 'Pending Approvals'
expected_result: Pending approvals page loads successfully; A list or table is displayed (may be empty if no transactions require approval); Columns include transaction reference, type, requestor, amount, submitted date, and action buttons (Approve/Reject); Page indicates count of pending items

test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/approval-engine/config; Locate the purchase_order configuration; Click 'Edit' action button; Change thresholdAmount from '5000000' to '10000000'; Change timeoutHours from '48' to '72'; Change timeoutAction from 'auto_reject' to 'auto_approve'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Configuration is updated successfully; thresholdAmount now shows 10000000; timeoutHours now shows 72; timeoutAction now shows 'auto_approve'; transactionType and isRequired remain unchanged; Success notification appears

test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/approval-engine/history; Wait for page to fully load; Observe the history list; If entries exist click on one to view detail
expected_result: Approval history page loads successfully; History entries show transaction reference, type, decision (approved/rejected), decided by, decision date; Each entry is clickable to view full detail including any comments or notes; If no history exists, an empty state message is shown

test_desc: Full CRUD - View audit log with filtering
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/approval-engine/audit; Wait for page to fully load; If filter controls exist apply a date range filter from '2026-01-01' to '2026-12-31'; If transaction type filter exists select 'purchase_order'; Click 'Apply Filter' or 'Search' button; Observe results
expected_result: Audit log page loads successfully; Audit entries display chronological log of all approval-related actions (config changes, approvals, rejections); Filters correctly narrow results by date range and transaction type; Each audit entry shows timestamp, action performed, user who performed it, and affected record; Results are paginated if there are many entries

test_desc: Edge Case - Invalid threshold and timeout values
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/approval-engine/config; Click 'Add Configuration' button; Select transactionType a valid type; Set isRequired to 'Yes'; Select a valid approverRoleId; Fill thresholdAmount with '-1000000'; Fill timeoutHours with '-5'; Select a valid timeoutAction; Click Submit button; Observe error; Then change thresholdAmount to '0'; Change timeoutHours to '0'; Click Submit button; Observe result
expected_result: Negative values: Form submission is rejected; Validation errors appear for thresholdAmount (must be positive or zero) and timeoutHours (must be positive); Zero values: Either accepted (threshold=0 means all transactions require approval, timeout=0 means no timeout) or rejected based on business rules; Clear error messages guide correction

test_desc: Edge Case - Duplicate transaction type configuration
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/approval-engine/config; Click 'Add Configuration' button; Select transactionType 'purchase_order' (already has a config); Set isRequired to 'Yes'; Select a valid approverRoleId; Fill thresholdAmount with '1000000'; Fill timeoutHours with '24'; Select timeoutAction 'auto_reject'; Click Submit button
expected_result: Form submission is rejected; Error message indicates that an approval configuration for transaction type 'purchase_order' already exists; Only one active configuration per transaction type is allowed; User is guided to edit the existing configuration instead; No duplicate configuration is created
